LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS MOTION FOR PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE.
